acip_client_callbacks_t(3) Library Functions Manual acip_client_callbacks_t(3)

NAME

acip_client_callbacks_t - Client-side packet handler callbacks.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/acip/handlers.h>

Data Fields


void(* on_ascii_frame )(const ascii_frame_packet_t *header, const void *frame_data, size_t data_len, void *ctx)
Called when ASCII frame received from server. void(* on_audio )(const void *audio_data, size_t audio_len, void *ctx)
Called when raw audio received from server. void(* on_audio_batch )(const audio_batch_packet_t *header, const float *samples, size_t num_samples, void *ctx)
Called when audio batch received from server. void(* on_audio_opus )(const void *opus_data, size_t opus_len, void *ctx)
Called when Opus audio received from server. void(* on_audio_opus_batch )(const void *batch_data, size_t batch_len, void *ctx)
Called when Opus batch received from server. void(* on_server_state )(const server_state_packet_t *state, void *ctx)
Called when server state update received. void(* on_error )(const error_packet_t *header, const char *message, void *ctx)
Called when error message received. void(* on_remote_log )(const remote_log_packet_t *header, const char *message, void *ctx)
Called when remote log received. void(* on_ping )(void *ctx)
Called when ping received (should send pong). void(* on_pong )(void *ctx)
Called when pong received. void(* on_clear_console )(void *ctx)
Called when server requests console clear. void(* on_crypto_rekey_request )(const void *payload, size_t payload_len, void *ctx)
Called when server sends crypto rekey request. void(* on_crypto_rekey_response )(const void *payload, size_t payload_len, void *ctx)
Called when server sends crypto rekey response. void(* on_webrtc_sdp )(const acip_webrtc_sdp_t *sdp, size_t total_len, void *ctx)
Called when WebRTC SDP offer/answer received. void(* on_webrtc_ice )(const acip_webrtc_ice_t *ice, size_t total_len, void *ctx)
Called when WebRTC ICE candidate received. void(* on_session_joined )(const acip_session_joined_t *joined, void *ctx)
Called when ACDS session join response received (Phase 3 WebRTC integration). void(* on_crypto_parameters )(packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, void *ctx)
Called when server sends CRYPTO_PARAMETERS (algorithm negotiation). void(* on_crypto_key_exchange_init )(packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, void *ctx)
Called when server sends KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT (crypto handshake). void(* on_crypto_auth_challenge )(packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, void *ctx)
Called when server sends AUTH_CHALLENGE (crypto handshake). void(* on_crypto_server_auth_resp )(packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, void *ctx)
Called when server sends SERVER_AUTH_RESP (crypto handshake mutual auth). void(* on_crypto_auth_failed )(packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, void *ctx)
Called when server sends AUTH_FAILED (crypto handshake failure). void(* on_crypto_handshake_complete )(packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, void *ctx)
Called when server sends HANDSHAKE_COMPLETE (crypto handshake success). void * app_ctx
Application context (passed to all callbacks).

Detailed Description

Client-side packet handler callbacks.

Applications implement these callbacks to handle incoming packets. NULL callbacks are skipped (no-op).

Definition at line 51 of file handlers.h.

Field Documentation

void* acip_client_callbacks_t::app_ctx

Application context (passed to all callbacks).
